meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Novu Connect
products.tagline: Ship agents where your users already work
products.summaryZh: 在用户已有的工作环境中部署代理
products.descriptionZh: Novu Connect 让任何 AI 代理都能在 Slack、Teams、WhatsApp、Telegram 和邮件之间进行双向对话，无需自行构建每个渠道的集成。你可以自带代理逻辑、模型或代码。Novu 负责通信层：投递、身份解析、线程管理、路由以及渠道特定格式，让你的代理能够触达用户已有的工作平台。
products.description: Novu Connect lets any AI agent have two-way conversations across Slack, Teams, WhatsApp, Telegram, and email without building each channel integration yourself. Bring your own agent logic, model, or code. Novu handles the communication layer: delivery, identity resolution, threading, routing, and channel-specific formatting, so your agent can reach users where they already work.

products.name: Wobo - AI Job Search
products.tagline: Tinder for jobs: swipe right and AI applies for you
products.summaryZh: 工作版Tinder：右滑，AI替你投简历
products.descriptionZh: 右滑。投递。Wobo 是你的个人AI招聘助手。它将经过筛选的职位与你的背景匹配，然后在你投递的每家公司官网上代为申请。你的简历、求职信以及每个申请问题：全部以你的口吻撰写，读起来就像你亲手所写，而非机器生成。无需填写无尽表格，没有虚假职位信息。只需右滑，醒来就能收到面试邀请。
products.description: Swipe right. Applied. Wobo is your personal AI recruiter. It matches pre-vetted jobs to your background, then applies on each company's own site for you. Your resume, cover letter, and every application question: all written in your voice, so it reads like you wrote it, not a bot. No endless forms. No ghost listings. Just swipe, and wake up to interviews.

products.name: AutoEdit
products.tagline: Your Claude AI Video Editor for Premiere Pro
products.summaryZh: 你的Claude AI视频编辑器，适用于Premiere Pro
products.descriptionZh: AutoEdit 帮助内容创作者将视频编辑速度提升10倍，只需几分钟即可将原始素材转化为干净的粗剪版本。它作为AI插件直接在Adobe Premiere Pro中运行。Claude AI能够理解内容，自动去除静音、填充词、不佳镜头、重拍和重复片段，同时生成字幕并整理时间线。编辑者保留对创意决策的控制权，而AutoEdit负责处理重复且枯燥的工作。
products.description: AutoEdit helps content creators edit their videos 10x faster by turning raw footage into a clean rough cut in minutes. It works directly inside Adobe Premiere Pro as an AI Plugin. Claude AI understands content, automatically removing silences, filler words, bad takes, restarts, and repeated sections while generating captions and structuring timelines. Editors stay in control of creative decisions while AutoEdit handles the repetitive, boring work.

products.name: Kickbacks.ai
products.tagline: Get paid to wait for Claude Code to finish
products.summaryZh: 等待Claude Code完成即可获得报酬
products.descriptionZh: Kickbacks.ai帮助开发者在AI代理等待状态中获得收入。广告商竞标一条小型赞助状态栏；用户获得50%的广告收入。
products.description: Kickbacks.ai helps developers get paid for AI-agent wait states. Advertisers bid for a tiny sponsored status line; users get 50% of ad revenue.

products.name: PandaProbe Cloud
products.tagline: agent engineering, fully managed.
products.summaryZh: Agent工程，全托管。
products.descriptionZh: PandaProbe Cloud 为您的团队提供针对智能体的全栈追踪、评估与监控，无需管理任何基础设施。无需运维负担，交付更优质的智能体。
products.description: PandaProbe Cloud gives your team full-stack tracing, evals, and monitoring for agents with zero infrastructure to manage. Ship better agents without the ops overhead.

products.name: Notra Image Generation
products.tagline: Turn merged PRs into on-brand marketing visuals
products.summaryZh: 将已合并的PR转化为符合品牌调性的营销视觉素材
products.descriptionZh: Notra 将已发布的工作转化为变更日志、发布帖和社交动态，并以你的风格呈现。
products.description: Notra turns shipped work into changelogs, launch posts, and social updates in your voice.

products.name: MockPilot
products.tagline: Turn live websites into editable mockups
products.summaryZh: 将实时网站转换为可编辑的模型
products.descriptionZh: MockPilot 可将任意实时网页转化为桌面端可编辑的模型。无需设计或编程技能，使用自然语言即可操作。📸 从任意网址捕获完整页面或单个组件 🎨 自动提取排版、色彩、组件及图标，生成可复用的素材库 💬 用日常英语编辑——只需告诉 AI 需要修改的内容，它便会调用你的素材库确保所有元素符合品牌规范 📦 导出为整洁的独立 HTML 文件。免费且开源。支持 macOS 与 Windows。
products.description: MockPilot turns any live webpage into an editable mockup on your desktop. Use natural language - no design or coding skills needed. 📸 Capture full pages or single components from any URL 🎨 Auto-extracts typography, colors, components & icons into a reusable asset library 💬 Edit in plain English — just tell the AI what to change, and it uses your assets to keep everything on-brand 📦 Export as clean, standalone HTML Free & open source. macOS + Windows.

products.name: Sulsaly
products.tagline: #1 Agentic AI sales leads &outreach platform for MENA Region
products.summaryZh: #1 面向中东和北非地区的智能AI销售线索与拓展平台
products.descriptionZh: Sulsaly 是中东和北非地区首个基于Agentic AI的销售情报平台。即时找到已验证的决策者，自动在LinkedIn、WhatsApp和Email上实现个性化触达，将成交速度提升5倍。覆盖阿拉伯世界超过5000万个已验证的B2B联系人。专为阿联酋、沙特阿拉伯、埃及、约旦及中东地区的销售团队打造。
products.description: Sulsaly is MENA's first Agentic AI sales intelligence platform. Find verified decision-makers instantly, automate personalized outreach across LinkedIn, WhatsApp and Email. Close deals 5x faster. 50M+ verified B2B contacts across the Arab world. Built for sales teams in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Jordan and the Middle East. أول منصة ذكاء اصطناعي للمبيعات في الشرق الأوسط. اكتشف صانعي القرار، أتمتة التواصل عبر واتساب ولينكدإن والبريد الإلكتروني، وأغلق صفقاتك أسرع بـ 5 مرات. 50M+ جهة اتصال موثقة.

products.name: AEVS
products.tagline: proof-of-execution for AI agents
products.summaryZh: AI代理的执行证明
products.descriptionZh: AEVS（Agent执行验证系统）是一个即插即用的SDK，可记录每一次AI代理工具调用，并为代理提供可验证的执行凭证。它捕获工具、输入、输出、状态和时序信息，形成防篡改证据，使团队无需依赖聊天记录或脆弱日志即可验证代理实际执行的内容。
products.description: AEVS (Agent Execution Verification System) is a drop-in SDK that records every AI agent tool call and gives agents verifiable execution receipts. It captures the tool, inputs, outputs, status, and timing as tamper-evident proof, so teams can verify what an agent actually executed without relying on chat history or fragile logs.

products.name: Reignat
products.tagline: Privacy-friendly web analytics platform built for makers
products.summaryZh: 为创作者打造的隐私友好型网站分析平台
products.descriptionZh: Reignat 是一款注重隐私的网站分析平台，专为创始人、初创企业和独立开发者设计，帮助他们在无需传统分析工具复杂性的前提下获得清晰洞察。实时追踪访客、页面浏览量、流量来源、设备、地理位置、转化漏斗及用户旅程。通过AI驱动的洞察理解趋势、发现机会并做出更优增长决策——这一切都来自一个快速、现代的仪表盘。
products.description: Reignat is a privacy-friendly web analytics platform built for founders, startups, and indie makers who want clear insights without the complexity of traditional analytics tools. Track visitors, pageviews, traffic sources, devices, locations, funnels, and user journeys in real time. Get AI-powered insights to understand trends, uncover opportunities, and make better growth decisions—all from a fast, modern dashboard.

products.name: Fonda
products.tagline: Your AI co-founder that remembers decisions + plans for you
products.summaryZh: 你的AI联合创始人，帮你记住决策和计划。
products.descriptionZh: 大多数“AI创业工具”只会给你一个空白的聊天框。Fonda不同——它是一个结构化的AI联合创始人，会带你走完经过验证的14步旅程：发现、验证、发布、扩展。它能记住每次对话中的决策、访谈和转向。在你浪费数月时间之前，它就会淘汰掉薄弱的想法。一旦验证通过，它就能交付你的落地页、商业案例和MVP计划。每天一个清晰的下一步。免费开始使用。
products.description: Most "AI startup tools" give you a blank chat box. Fonda is different — it's a structured AI co-founder that runs a proven 14-step journey with you: Discover, Validate, Launch, Scale. It remembers every decision, interview, and pivot across sessions. It kills weak ideas before you waste months on them. It ships your landing page, business case, and MVP plan once validated. One clear next move, every day. Free to start.

products.name: Synopsule
products.tagline: On device private AI meeting transcripts
products.summaryZh: 设备端私有AI会议转录
products.descriptionZh: Synopsule 使用 Whisper 在 Mac 或 iPhone 上记录并转录你的对话，标记每位发言者，并仅在你要求时进行总结。无需账户，无需上传。现已上架 App Store——Mac 和 iPhone 一次购买仅需 4.99 美元。
products.description: Synopsule records and transcribes your conversations on your Mac or iPhone with Whisper, labels every speaker, and only summarizes when you ask. No accounts, no uploads. Now on the App Store — one $4.99 purchase for Mac and iPhone.

products.name: MiMo Code
products.tagline: A coding agent with explicit long-term memory architecture
products.summaryZh: 具备显式长期记忆架构的编码代理
products.descriptionZh: MiMo Code 是基于 OpenCode 构建的开源终端 AI 编码代理。针对长周期任务进行优化，通过独立的检查点子代理管理无界上下文窗口，执行沙箱工作流，并通过定期维护实现迭代演进。
products.description: MiMo Code is an open-source terminal AI coding agent built on OpenCode. Optimized for long-horizon tasks, it uses an independent checkpoint subagent to manage unbounded context windows, executes sandbox workflows, and evolves via scheduled maintenance.

products.name: Dropmatico
products.tagline: Drop. Pick. Done.
products.summaryZh: 放下。拾起。完成。
products.descriptionZh: Dropmatico是一款图像工作流工具，可一次性完成调整大小、压缩和格式转换，支持90多种预设和34个平台（包括Instagram、LinkedIn、X、Snapchat、Substack、Amazon、Etsy、Noon、Flipkart、Shopify等）。一张图片，适配所有平台。或所有图片，适配单一平台。无论哪种方式，一次完成。
products.description: Dropmatico is the image workflow tool that resizes, compresses, and converts in one pass, across 90+ presets and 34 platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, X, Snapchat, Substack, Amazon, Etsy, Noon, Flipkart, Shopify, and more). One image, every platform. Or every image, one platform. Either way, one pass.

products.name: Verol
products.tagline: Stop AI hallucinations
products.summaryZh: 停止AI幻觉
products.descriptionZh: 别再问大语言模型“这是真的吗”了——它们产生幻觉时只会再次撒谎。Verol通过为ChatGPT、Claude和Gemini添加独立的验证层来解决这一问题。它解析回答，执行实时网络查询，并通过专用后端管道验证来源。你将获得即时判定、置信度指标和可点击的来源。无数据追踪；历史记录保留在本地。提供5次免费试用。套餐从每月4.99美元起。
products.description: Stop asking LLMs "is this true?" when they hallucinate, they will just lie again. Verol fixes this by adding an independent verification layer to ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. It parses answers, executes real-time web lookups, and validates sources through a dedicated backend pipeline. You get instant verdicts, confidence metrics, and clickable sources. No data tracking; history stays local. 5 free runs to test it. Plans from $4.99/mo.

products.name: Relay
products.tagline: Paste a site & get an AI receptionist that learns from calls
products.summaryZh: 粘贴网站，获取能通过通话学习的人工智能接待员。
products.descriptionZh: Relay 将网站链接转化为可运行的 AI 电话接待员。它提供全天候应答服务，在 Google Calendar、Square、Calendly、Outlook 等平台上完成真实预约——仅基于商家自身事实进行回答，并在获得店主许可后从每次通话中学习。
products.description: Relay turns a website link into a working AI phone receptionist. It answers 24/7, books real appointments on Google Calendar, Square, Calendly, Outlook & more — answers only from the business's own facts, and learns from every call, with owner approval.

products.name: EmailFlow.AI
products.tagline: Like Claude Design for Email Newsletters
products.summaryZh: 像Claude设计邮件简报一样
products.descriptionZh: EmailFlow.AI 可在数秒内将文本提示转化为精致、符合品牌调性的邮件，并自动发送。只需扫描一次网站，即可抓取你的标志、配色和语气，让每场营销活动都保持品牌一致性。提供超过12,000个模板、可视化自动化流程以及可管理的投递发送功能（验证域名后即可开始发送）。与按联系人计费的工具不同，其定价为固定费用，并设有真正的永久免费方案：无需绑定银行卡，每月可发送5,000封邮件，支持500名订阅者。
products.description: EmailFlow.AI turns a text prompt into a polished, on-brand email in seconds, then sends and automates it. Scan your site once and it captures your logo, palette, and voice so every campaign looks like you. Get access to 12,000+ templates, visual automations, and managed-deliverability sending (verify a domain, start sending). Unlike per-contact tools, pricing is flat, and there's a genuine Free Forever plan: no card, 5,000 emails/mo, 500 subscribers.

products.name: VEXI
products.tagline: Open-source AI coding agent for your terminal
products.summaryZh: 开源AI编程助手，适用于终端环境
products.descriptionZh: VEXI 是一款面向偏好终端操作的开发者打造的开源 AI 编程代理。自带 API 密钥，连接 OpenAI、Anthropic 及其他服务商，通过轻量、多语言、注重隐私的命令行界面加速编码、调试、重构与自动化流程。
products.description: VEXI is an open-source AI coding agent built for developers who prefer the terminal. Bring your own API keys, connect OpenAI, Anthropic, and other providers, and accelerate coding, debugging, refactoring, and automation through a lightweight, multilingual, privacy-friendly CLI.

products.name: Tinfoil Pigeons
products.tagline: See the aircraft flying over you on a retro radar scope
products.summaryZh: 在复古雷达屏幕上看到飞机从头顶飞过。
products.descriptionZh: 我家上空飞过的是什么飞机？Tinfoil Pigeons 是一个实时雷达界面：输入你的邮政编码，即可查看当前头顶上空的航班，点击任一航班即可了解其详情。
products.description: What plane is flying over my house? Tinfoil Pigeons is a live radar scope: enter your postcode and see the flights overhead right now, then tap one to find out what it is.

products.name: Flara Pro
products.tagline: AI skin trigger tracker for flare patterns
products.summaryZh: AI皮肤触发追踪器，用于识别发作模式
products.descriptionZh: Flara Pro追踪皮肤反应、食物、天气、化妆品、压力、睡眠及照片，随后将可能的诱发因素总结为每日皮肤评分、30天热力图、AI触发因素分析，以及可供皮肤科医生使用的PDF导出报告。
products.description: Flara Pro tracks skin reactions, foods, weather, cosmetics, stress, sleep, and photos, then summarizes likely flare triggers into a daily skin score, 30-day heatmap, AI trigger analysis, and dermatologist-ready PDF exports.
